extension.description: v4.7.0: Trakt card now flexes your taste - adds TOTAL WATCH TIME (auto formatted to hours or days) plus your TOP GENRE tallied from all watched shows (weighted by play count). v4.6.9: Richer Account Cards with days left, expiry, fidelity, Trakt stats + lists, TMDB live key validation. v4.6.8: Fixed View Account Cards crash after RD auth and stopped 'Install addon?' prompts during sync. v4.6.7: Speed Test - gauge redrawn as a proper speedometer. v4.6.6: Full-screen Account Cards and Speed Test. Previous features: Save My Build, Log Uploader, device code auth, syncs to 18+ addons.

extension.summary: Genesis - Cloud, Local Media, Free Links, Anime, Debrid, Plex & Emby
extension.description:
Genesis v1.5.0 - Cloud Browser, Local Scanner, Plex & Emby Integration!
NEW in v1.7.0 (2026) - NEW: Premiumize Hub - full feature surface for Premiumize.me * Account Dashboard (status, expiry, days left, space used, fair-use, customer ID) * Cloud Files browser with breadcrumbs, parent navigation, sort (folders first), per-item context menu: rename, delete, move, item details, ZIP download, copy direct URL * "+ New Folder" inline action in every folder view * Recursive "Recent Files" (item/listall) showing every file in your cloud, sorted by created_at * Transfers view with live progress bar, status, size and per transfer context menu (open folder, play file, delete) * "+ Add Transfer" submenu - Magnet / Torrent URL / DDL / NZB * Clear Finished Transfers (one click) * Supported Hosters list (services/list) with CACHE / QUEUE / Fair-Use multipliers and aliases * ZIP Generate - bundle items / folders into a downloadable .zip * Generic send_to_pm() helper available for other modules - NEW: "Send to Premiumize Cloud" mode in Source Picker (push any magnet / URL from a source list into your cloud, multi-send) - UI: Cloud main menu now exposes a top-level ">> Premiumize Hub" entry when Premiumize is linked - Fix: dead "cloud_pm_files" and "cloud_pm_transfers" menu items now route to the new hub (previously they did nothing) - Fix: multi-file Premiumize torrents now resolvable via the new item_details / transfer_directdl flow
v1.6.0 (2026) - NEW: TorBox Hub - full feature surface * Account Dashboard (plan, expiry, totals, server, customer ID) * Torrents browser with live progress bar, ETA, speed, seeds/peers and a context menu for pause / resume / reannounce / stop seeding / queue top & bottom / delete * Multi-file picker when playing torrents from the cloud * Built-in TorBox Search with the same source picker UI * Usenet downloads - add NZB URL, browse, play, control * Web Downloads (DDL) - add hoster URL, browse, play, control * Add Magnet / Hash quick action - NEW: "Source Not Cached" confirmation dialog * Clear warning when picking an uncached source * One-click "Queue to TorBox Cloud" so users can come back later * Configurable via Settings - Playback - Warn before playing UNCACHED sources - UI: source picker now shows explicit [CACHED] / [TORRENT] / [FREE] badges and a legend header so users can no longer miss why a click "did nothing" - Fix: Cloud Browser TorBox playback (requestdl now sends the required ?token= and picks the largest video file for multi- file torrents) - Fix: Cloud Browser TorBox delete now uses the correct JSON body shape (no more silent failures) - Cloud Browser: TorBox listings now expose download speed, ETA, seeds/peers and ratio fields
Created by zeus768.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content.
extension.news:
v1.7.0 (2026) - NEW: Premiumize Hub - full feature surface for Premiumize.me * Account Dashboard (status, expiry, days left, space used, fair-use, customer ID) * Cloud Files browser with breadcrumbs, parent navigation, sort (folders first), per-item context menu: rename, delete, move, item details, ZIP download, copy direct URL * "+ New Folder" inline action in every folder view * Recursive "Recent Files" (item/listall) showing every file in your cloud, sorted by created_at * Transfers view with live progress bar, status, size and per transfer context menu (open folder, play file, delete) * "+ Add Transfer" submenu - Magnet / Torrent URL / DDL / NZB * Clear Finished Transfers (one click) * Supported Hosters list (services/list) with CACHE / QUEUE / Fair-Use multipliers and aliases * ZIP Generate - bundle items / folders into a downloadable .zip * Generic send_to_pm() helper available for other modules - NEW: "Send to Premiumize Cloud" mode in Source Picker (push any magnet / URL from a source list into your cloud, multi-send) - UI: Cloud main menu now exposes a top-level ">> Premiumize Hub" entry when Premiumize is linked - Fix: dead "cloud_pm_files" and "cloud_pm_transfers" menu items now route to the new hub (previously they did nothing) - Fix: multi-file Premiumize torrents now resolvable via the new item_details / transfer_directdl flow
v1.6.0 (2026) - NEW: TorBox Hub - full feature surface * Account Dashboard (plan, expiry, totals, server, customer ID) * Torrents browser with live progress bar, ETA, speed, seeds/peers and a context menu for pause / resume / reannounce / stop seeding / queue top & bottom / delete * Multi-file picker when playing torrents from the cloud * Built-in TorBox Search with the same source picker UI * Usenet downloads - add NZB URL, browse, play, control * Web Downloads (DDL) - add hoster URL, browse, play, control * Add Magnet / Hash quick action - NEW: "Source Not Cached" confirmation dialog * Clear warning when picking an uncached source * One-click "Queue to TorBox Cloud" so users can come back later * Configurable via Settings - Playback - Warn before playing UNCACHED sources - UI: source picker now shows explicit [CACHED] / [TORRENT] / [FREE] badges and a legend header so users can no longer miss why a click "did nothing" - Fix: Cloud Browser TorBox playback (requestdl now sends the required ?token= and picks the largest video file for multi- file torrents) - Fix: Cloud Browser TorBox delete now uses the correct JSON body shape (no more silent failures) - Cloud Browser: TorBox listings now expose download speed, ETA, seeds/peers and ratio fields
v1.5.9 (2026) - TorBox: dual authorization - choose at link time: * Get Code (device-code flow via tor.box/link) * Manual API key entry - TorBox: fixed cloud-browser playback (requestdl now sends the required `token` query parameter) - Settings: "Authorize TorBox (Code or API Key)" replaces the old API-key-only label
v1.5.8 (2026) - TorBox: rewritten provider integration - Manual API key authorization (paste key from torbox.app/settings) - Smart magnet resolver with file selection, season/episode matching, sample/extras filtering and m2ts safety check - check_cache uses POST /torrents/checkcached with hash list - Direct download links via /torrents/requestdl - Cloud browser supports both Torrents and Usenet folders - Account info shows plan name (Free/Essential/Pro/Standard) - Settings: TorBox auth simplified (single "Set TorBox API Key" action)
v1.5.0 (2026) - NEW: Plex Media Server Integration - Browse libraries, On Deck, Recently Added - Search and direct playback - NEW: Emby Media Server Integration - Browse libraries, Continue Watching, Next Up - Search and direct playback - NEW: TMDb Artwork for Local Media - Auto-fetches posters/fanart for local files - Menu categories only visible when enabled - New Plex and Emby icons for all themes
v1.4.0 (2026) - NEW: Cloud Browser for debrid services - NEW: Local Media Scanner - NEW: Free Links Integration
v1.3.1 (2026) - Renamed to Genesis - Added script.genesis.skins as dependency - Updated icon and fanart
v1.3.0 (2026) - NEW: Full Anime & Manga Category - NEW: 7 Anime Torrent Sites - NEW: Jikan API integration
v1.2.0 (2026) - Enhanced X-Ray with Multi-Source Ratings - Enhanced Source Picker with filters
v1.1.0 (2026) - Live Channels Section with EPG - Latest Releases (In Cinemas Now) - X-Ray Metadata
v1.0.0 (2026) - Initial release

extension.description: Orion v3.7.0 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIG poster cards, cyan (#00D4FF) theme. Netflix-style views for History, Favorites, Continue Watching. Netflix-style Trakt integration. Netflix-style Settings panel. Season dropdown and episode grid. Master skin toggle in Settings to switch between Netflix and classic list view.
extension.news: [3.7.12] FIX: Playback no longer re-resolves the link or shows "Playback failed" before finally starting. play_source() now hands the resolved stream URL to Kodi via setResolvedUrl(HANDLE, True, ...) instead of calling xbmc.Player().play() directly and then signalling failure with setResolvedUrl(False). Eliminates the "Resolving with Real-Debrid..." → "Playback failed" → "Resolving with Real-Debrid..." loop seen on every play. Also sets ListItem.setContentLookup(False) so Kodi doesn't HEAD-probe the debrid hotlink (some hosts 403 the probe and abort playback). [3.7.11] Fix: "Resolving with Real-Debrid..." (and the Premiumize / AllDebrid / TorBox variants) progress dialog could stay visible on top of the player after the stream had already started playing. play_source() now uses a non-modal background progress dialog (DialogProgressBG) via a small _BGProgress adapter, so the resolver / debrid services keep calling .create / .update / .close exactly as before but the dialog never collides with the video window. [3.7.10] Fix: the "Resolving link..." / "Waiting for TorBox..." progress dialog and the Kodi "Working..." spinner no longer linger on top of the video after playback starts. play_source now signals plugin completion via setResolvedUrl, force-closes any residual progress/busy dialogs after Player.play(), and the TorBox resolver no longer hammers the dialog with redundant updates that pinned it on-screen. [3.7.9] TorBox: authorization now supports BOTH API key entry and the official Device Code flow (with QR code) — pick your preferred method when you tap Authorize TorBox. Verification page: torbox.app/oauth/device. [3.7.8] TorBox: simpler API key authorization (no more device-code wait), faster magnet resolution, batch cache check now uses POST/JSON for accuracy. Netflix-style skin is now OFF by default — enable it from Settings > Appearance if you want the new look. [3.7.6] PunchPlay.tv is BETA / placeholder. The full Trakt-parity menu (watchlist, collection, watched, lists, recommendations, trending, popular, scrobbling) is wired up, but not every endpoint on the PunchPlay backend is live yet — some lists may return empty until the PunchPlay team finishes their public API. Banners and labels added everywhere PunchPlay appears so users know what to expect. [3.7.5] PunchPlay.tv now has full Trakt-parity: watchlist, collection, watched history, custom & liked lists, recommendations, trending and popular. Right-click context menu supports Remove from Watchlist/Collection/History/List. Netflix-style PunchPlay submenu. Auto-mark watched at 80%+ (movies and episodes). Settings > PunchPlay now accepts your Client ID and Client Secret. [3.7.4] Fix: Trakt list items can now be removed via right-click context menu (custom lists, collection, watched history). New: PunchPlay.tv integration — device-code login + automatic scrobbling alongside Trakt during episode playback. Settings > PunchPlay to authorize. [3.7.0] Netflix-style History, Favorites, Continue Watching grids. Netflix-style Settings panel. All views use proper poster art. Trakt fully skinned. Master skin toggle controls everything. [3.6.2] Wider poster tiles, SEASONS button fix, back navigation fix.

extension.summary: Premium Xtream Codes IPTV Player with Poseidon Guide EPG Grid
extension.description:
Poseidon Player provides a premium IPTV experience with: - Poseidon Guide: Full EPG Grid view with channel logos, time slots, and program info - TV Guide/EPG: Detailed program listings with current/next shows - Live TV: Categories and channel lists with EPG info - Movies (VOD): With genres, top-rated, and recently added - TV Series: Full series/season/episode navigation - Favorites: Save your favorite channels, movies, and series - Search: Search across all content - Recently Watched: Track your viewing history - Catch-up TV: Watch past programs - Reminders: Set reminders for upcoming programs with popup notifications - Background Service: Keep-alive for stable streams, automatic reminder notifications - IPTV Manager Integration: Full TV Guide experience - Stream Format Options: HLS (m3u8) for stability or TS for direct streams
All powered by Xtream Codes API. Enter your own credentials on first run.
extension.disclaimer: Poseidon Player does not provide any content. You must provide your own Xtream Codes credentials. Author: poseidon12
extension.news: v2.5.0 - NEW: Background service for keep-alive streams & reminder popup notifications v2.4.0 - FIXED: Persistent login state (no repeated login notifications), Stream stability with HLS/m3u8 format + inputstream.adaptive support v2.3.0 - Added Poseidon Guide (EPG Grid), Program Reminders, Fixed startup issues, Improved cache handling

extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - 120+ scrapers, Stremio, Trakt, Debrid, Live Movie Channels
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 120+ scrapers providing maximum coverage for movies and TV shows.
=== USENET & NZB (NEW v2.9.70) === |- EasyNews: Full Usenet search and streaming integration |- NZB Indexers: NZBGeek, NZBFinder, NZBPlanet, DrunkenSlug, NZB.su, NZBHydra2 |- Download Clients: SABnzbd, NZBGet support |- Direct NNTP: Configure your own Usenet provider |- All features optional - no credentials required to use other features
=== DIRECT STREAM SITES (NEW v2.9.14, No-Streamtape) === - Archive.org (public-domain MP4), Cineby, VidFast, RiveStream - UiraLive, NetMirror, VidBinge, HollyMovieHD All return direct MP4 / M3U8 via JSON APIs - no embed hosters.
=== FREE STREAMS (No Debrid Required) === - VidSrc Network: VidSrc.xyz, VidSrc.cc, VidSrc.in, VidSrc.pm, VidSrc.nl, VidSrc.pro, VidSrc.me, VidSrc.to - Embed Services: 2Embed, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay, MoviesAPI, SmashyStream - Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, 123Movies, MoviesJoy, Putlocker - And 40+ more free streaming sources!
=== STREMIO FREE ADDONS === - Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - KnightCrawler, Jackettio, AIOStreams, Torrentio (Free Mode) - PlutoTV, Tubi, and more!
=== TORRENT SITES === - Primary: EZTV, ThePirateBay, SolidTorrents - Secondary: LimeTorrents, Torrentz2, RARBG, Kickass, TorrentDownload - Additional: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, and more!
=== ANIME === - Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe - Nyaa, SubsPlease, AnimeTosho, and more!
=== ASIAN DRAMA === - WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad
=== INTERNATIONAL === - Russian: RuTracker, RuTor, NNM-Club - Chinese: BTBTT - French: Torrent9
=== STREMIO DEBRID SCRAPERS === - Torrentio, EasyNews+
=== FEATURES === - Live Movie Channels with EPG (35+ channels) |- Usenet/NZB Integration: EasyNews streaming, 7+ indexers, SABnzbd/NZBGet support - Episode Countdown Tracker - Network Browser (Netflix, HBO, BBC, etc.) - Returning Shows (New Seasons) - AI-Powered Natural Language Search - Trakt Integration with Scrobbling - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Put.io - Cloud Storage: Google Drive, MEGA, pCloud, MediaFire, Sync.com, iDrive, Filepax, Degoo - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration - Pre-scrape on Hover - Source Caching
Revived and massively expanded by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
NOTE (v2.9.21): All scrapers now live in a separate Kodi script module, "Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources" (script.module.salts_scrapers), authored by Zeus768. It is auto-installed as a dependency.
extension.news:
v2.9.72 (2026-05) - TRAKT CUSTOM LISTS POSTER FIX |- Fixed: Trakt custom lists now display correct posters and metadata || Previously, custom Trakt lists (accessed via Trakt -> My Lists) were || not fetching posters from TMDB even though the TMDB ID was available, || resulting in default addon icons instead of movie/show posters. || || Changes in v2.9.72: || 1. trakt_list() function now fetches poster_path from TMDB API || 2. Added backdrop/fanart image fetching for proper backgrounds || 3. Added overview and rating information display || 4. Added proper context menus (favorites, Trakt actions, etc.) || 5. Improved error handling for TMDB API failures || || All Trakt features now consistently display correct posters: || - Watchlist (Movies & TV Shows) ✓ || - Collection (Movies & TV Shows) ✓ || - Trending (Movies & TV Shows) ✓ || - Popular (Movies & TV Shows) ✓ || - Custom Lists ✓ (FIXED in this version)
v2.9.71 (2026-05) - UNIFIED DEBRID CLOUD MANAGER - ALL SERVICES SUPPORTED |- Added: Unified Debrid Cloud Manager for ALL debrid services ||| * Real-Debrid cloud manager (view/manage torrents) ||| * Premiumize cloud manager (view/manage transfers) ||| * AllDebrid cloud manager (view/manage magnets) ||| * TorBox cloud manager (enhanced existing) ||| * Put.io cloud manager (view/manage transfers) ||| * EasyNews manager (account info) ||| * NZB download manager (SABnzbd/NZBGet queue & history) ||| |- Added: Individual cloud managers for each service ||| * Access from: Debrid Cloud Manager menu ||| * Each service shows: Currently Downloading, Completed, Add Magnet ||| * Service-specific colors for easy identification ||| * Context menu actions: Delete, Refresh ||| |- Added: Unified view across all services ||| * See ALL downloads from ALL services in one place ||| * Shows service name, status, and progress ||| * Quick overview of entire download ecosystem ||| |- Added: NZB download client management ||| * SABnzbd queue and history viewing ||| * NZBGet queue and history viewing ||| * Delete downloads directly from Kodi ||| * Real-time progress monitoring ||| |- Enhanced: Debrid Cloud Manager menu ||| * Auto-detects enabled services ||| * Shows only configured services ||| * Color-coded service names ||| * Unified view option for all services ||| |- Cloud manager supports: ||| * Real-time download progress ||| * Delete torrents/transfers ||| * Add magnets to cloud ||| * View completed downloads ||| * Service status information ||| |- All cloud managers fully integrated ||| * Native Kodi UI ||| * Context menus for quick actions ||| * Automatic refresh after operations ||| * Error handling and notifications
v2.9.70 (2026-05) - USENET & NZB SUPPORT + EASYNEWS INTEGRATION |- Added: Full EasyNews integration - search and stream Usenet content directly ||| * EasyNews search API for movies and TV shows ||| * Direct HTTP streaming from Usenet (no download required) ||| * Settings -> Usenet/NZB -> EasyNews credentials ||| * Integrated into source selection alongside torrents ||| |- Added: Comprehensive NZB indexer support (Newznab API) ||| * NZBGeek, NZBFinder, NZBPlanet support ||| * DrunkenSlug, NZB.su integration ||| * NZBHydra2 meta-indexer support ||| * Custom Newznab indexer (add any Newznab-compatible site) ||| * Settings -> NZB Indexers (7 indexers total) ||| |- Added: NZB download client integration ||| * SABnzbd client support (queue management, downloads, history) ||| * NZBGet client support (JSON-RPC API) ||| * Send NZB files directly to download clients ||| * Settings -> Usenet/NZB -> Download Client configuration ||| |- Added: Direct Usenet NNTP support ||| * Configure your own Usenet provider ||| * Direct NNTP downloads with SSL support ||| * Multi-connection downloading (up to 20 connections) ||| * Settings -> Usenet/NZB -> Usenet Provider ||| |- Added: Unified Debrid Cloud Manager ||| * EasyNews appears in Debrid Services menu ||| * NZB sources integrated into source selection ||| * Download management for SABnzbd/NZBGet ||| * Search across all indexers simultaneously ||| |- Enhanced: Source selection now includes Usenet/NZB results ||| * EasyNews results show alongside torrents ||| * NZB indexer results with size, age, and quality info ||| * Direct streaming from EasyNews (no download wait) ||| * Send NZBs to download clients with one click ||| |- All Usenet features fully configurable in Settings ||| * No credentials required to test (all optional) ||| * Add your own indexers via Custom Newznab ||| * Compatible with existing debrid workflow
v2.9.69 (2026-05) - TORBOX FINAL FIX - STOPPED REPEATED API CALLS |- Fixed: The ACTUAL root cause - Kodi was calling torbox_play_file() multiple ||| times (4 calls in 18 seconds) because I was using player.play() instead of ||| xbmcplugin.setResolvedUrl(). Each retry made a NEW TorBox API request, ||| causing API spam that eventually kicked the stream out. ||| ||| THE REAL ISSUE ALL ALONG: ||| - Using player.play() with plugin:// URLs causes Kodi to retry on failure ||| - Each retry calls torbox_play_file() AGAIN ||| - Each call makes a NEW requestdl API call to TorBox ||| - Multiple rapid API calls -> TorBox rate limits/kicks stream ||| ||| v2.9.69 Solution: ||| 1. Changed from player.play() to xbmcplugin.setResolvedUrl() ||| 2. setResolvedUrl tells Kodi "here's the final URL, stop calling me" ||| 3. Function only called ONCE, not 4+ times ||| 4. Single TorBox API request instead of spam ||| 5. Stream plays smoothly without repeated loading attempts ||| ||| This was the issue from the very first report - stream would start playing ||| but then keep trying to load and eventually fail. Now fixed properly. ||| v2.9.68 (2026-05) - TORBOX CODEC FIX - REMOVED ALL HEADERS |- Fixed: "CVideoPlayerVideo::OpenStream - could not open video codec" error. ||| v2.9.67 was adding headers using pipe syntax (URL|User-Agent=...) which was ||| preventing the video codec from opening properly. Kodi couldn't parse the ||| URL format correctly, causing immediate playback failure. ||| ||| ROOT CAUSE FOUND: Headers in pipe format break FFmpeg's video codec initialization. ||| ||| v2.9.68 Changes: ||| 1. REMOVED ALL headers from URL (no pipe syntax) ||| 2. Using CLEAN TorBox URL only ||| 3. Let Kodi/FFmpeg handle the connection natively ||| 4. Simplified torbox_play_file() function completely ||| ||| TorBox URLs work WITHOUT custom headers - they don't need User-Agent. ||| The previous failures were caused by my header additions, not lack of headers. ||| v2.9.67 (2026-05) - TORBOX PLAYBACK FIX - REMOVED INCOMPATIBLE INPUTSTREAM SETTINGS |- Fixed: TorBox streams now play immediately without long timeouts or failures. ||| v2.9.66 was forcing inputstream.adaptive with HLS manifest type, but TorBox ||| serves DIRECT MKV/MP4 files, not HLS streams. This mismatch caused Kodi to ||| wait ~80 seconds trying to parse the file as HLS before failing with ||| "Playlist Player: skipping unplayable item". ||| ||| Changes in v2.9.67: ||| 1. REMOVED inputstream.adaptive force (let Kodi auto-detect stream type) ||| 2. REMOVED HLS manifest_type setting (not applicable to direct files) ||| 3. REMOVED application/vnd.apple.mpegurl MIME type ||| 4. Simplified headers to just User-Agent (all that's needed) ||| 5. Kodi now correctly handles MKV/MP4 files with native FFmpeg ||| ||| All other v2.9.66 fixes retained: ||| - Fresh URL requests (no caching) ||| - Retry logic with exponential backoff ||| - Monitor pause during playback ||| v2.9.66 (2026-05) - TORBOX STREAM EXPIRATION FIX - ALWAYS FRESH URLs |- Fixed: TorBox stream kickout issue - URLs are now always freshly requested ||| instead of cached/reused. TorBox CDN URLs are time-limited or single-use, ||| so the previous caching approach was causing "Playback failed" errors when ||| Kodi retried with expired URLs. Now every playback request gets a brand new ||| URL from TorBox with proper streaming headers and retry logic. ||| ||| Changes: ||| 1. REMOVED URL caching that was causing expired URL reuse ||| 2. Added retry logic with exponential backoff (3 attempts) ||| 3. Added proper User-Agent and streaming headers for TorBox CDN ||| 4. Enhanced error handling and logging for debugging ||| 5. Background monitor now pauses during active playback to reduce API load ||| v2.9.65 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER HIGHLIGHT ULTIMATE FIX - BRIGHT GOLD + BBCODE STRIPPING |- Fixed: Link picker highlight NOW TRULY WORKS! BBCode COLOR tag issue completely solved: || || 1. BRIGHT GOLD BACKGROUND (fully opaque) with 6px border - unmistakably visible || 2. BBCODE STRIPPING for focused items - plain black text on gold background || 3. VISUAL ARROW INDICATOR (>) on left side of selected row || || Selected link: bright gold background, thick border, arrow, clean black text || Non-selected links: keep colorful BBCode formatting || Selection is now IMPOSSIBLE to confuse! ||||
v2.9.64 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER HIGHLIGHT ATTEMPT (INCOMPLETE) |- Fixed: CACHED torrents now properly highlight with white background. Issue was || BBCode COLOR tags in cached item labels were overriding the textcolor setting. || Added selectedcolor attribute to force black text on white background for ALL || items regardless of BBCode formatting. Both cached and non-cached items now || highlight identically with white background and gold border. ||| v2.9.62 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER WHITE HIGHLIGHT |- Changed: Link picker selected item now has WHITE background with gold border || for maximum visibility and contrast against dark interface. Text changed to || black for perfect readability on white background. Selected link now || impossible to miss when navigating through sources. ||| v2.9.61 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER VISIBILITY ENHANCEMENT |- Enhanced: Link picker background brightness significantly increased for better || visibility. Changed from dark background (FF1a1f26) to lighter gray (FF3d4758) || so the selected item with gold border now clearly stands out against the dark || interface. Maximum contrast achieved for easy navigation. ||| v2.9.60 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER HIGHLIGHTING CRITICAL FIX |- Fixed: Link picker highlighting now properly visible using Kodi's native || bordertexture method. Previous attempt (v2.9.59) had Z-order issue where || borders were being drawn but covered by background layer. Now uses single || image control with 3-pixel bright yellow/gold border (bordertexture) || ensuring perfect visibility when scrolling through sources. ||| v2.9.59 (2026-05) - LINK PICKER NAVIGATION FIX |- Fixed: Link picker (source list) now properly highlights the selected item || when scrolling through links. Added thick bright yellow/gold border around || the focused item making it crystal clear which link you're about to play. || Previous highlighting was not visible, making it difficult to navigate || through multiple sources. This fix ensures perfect visibility regardless || of the fanart backdrop. ||| v2.9.58 (2026-05) - IMPROVED TORBOX PLAYBACK + ENHANCED LINK PICKER VISIBILITY |- Fixed: Torbox Cloud completed torrents no longer show "Getting playback URL" || dialog when playing from the download manager. The system now detects when || torrents are already downloaded and skips the unnecessary loading dialog, || providing instant playback access for completed downloads. |- Enhanced: Link picker (source list) visibility dramatically improved with || a strong white semi-transparent highlight overlay on focused items. This || makes it easy to see which cached torrent you're selecting, even against || dark fanart backdrops like The Punisher. Gold accent borders maintained || for brand consistency while ensuring maximum readability. || v2.9.57 (2026-01) - UI IMPROVEMENTS + TORBOX CLOUD MANAGER |- Fixed: Link picker UI visibility issue - focused links now have a white | semi-transparent highlight instead of dark-on-dark, making it easy to | see which link you're clicking on regardless of the fanart backdrop. |- Added: Torbox Cloud Manager - comprehensive download management system | * New "Debrid Cloud Manager" section in main menu | * Currently Downloading view - shows all active torrents with: | - Real-time progress percentage | - Download speed (MB/s) | - Seed count | - Total size | * Completed Downloads view - browse finished torrents | * Background notification system - get notified when downloads complete | * Add magnets to cloud - paste magnet links directly | * Context menu actions on all torrents: | - View Files (see all files in the torrent) | - Delete Torrent | - Refresh | * Auto-refresh support for real-time updates |- Torbox monitoring daemon runs in background when Cloud Manager is active | and notifies you the moment a download finishes | v2.9.56 (2026-01) - DEGOO CLOUD STORAGE - Added: Degoo as an 8th cloud provider, alongside Google Drive, MEGA, pCloud, MediaFire, Sync.com, iDrive, and Filepax. * Two modes: Full Account Browsing (via unofficial GraphQL API) and Shared-Link Mode (paste public Degoo URLs). * Settings -> Cloud -> Degoo: Enable, choose mode, authorize account or add share links. * WARNING: Uses unofficial reverse-engineered Degoo API from github.com/bernd-wechner/Degoo. May break if Degoo changes backend. Account suspension risk with automated access. Use at own risk. * Full account mode walks every folder, returns direct streaming URLs via Degoo's CDN (appears to be Google Cloud Services). * Share-link mode scrapes public Degoo share pages for direct URLs, falls back to passing share URL to debrid services. * Both modes integrate seamlessly with SALTS cloud library (Movies, TV Shows, Recently Added) with TMDB metadata matching.
v2.9.55 (2026-01) - IDRIVE ACCOUNT MODE + SYNC.COM RESOLVER FIXES - MediaFire closed public developer self-signup years ago, so the old email + password + app_id + api_key flow only works for legacy accounts. SALTS now uses MediaFire's anonymous public-folder API instead - no developer account, no app, no signature required. * Settings -> Cloud -> MediaFire -> "Add MediaFire Public Folder": paste a https://www.mediafire.com/folder/<KEY>/Name link (folder must be shared "Anyone with the link"). SALTS walks every file and subfolder via /folder/get_content.php anonymously. * Add as many public folders as you like; each is stored in special://profile/addon_data/plugin.video.salts/mediafire_folders.json * "Remove a MediaFire Folder" lets you drop one or all of them. * Direct-download URLs are resolved via /file/get_links.php (no auth needed for files inside a public folder). - Settings panel for MediaFire simplified: no more app_id, api_key, email or password fields. Just enable + add folder(s).
v2.9.53 (2026-01) - FOUR NEW CLOUD PROVIDERS - Added: pCloud (full account browsing). * Settings -> Cloud -> pCloud: pick region (global / EU), enter email + password, press "Authorize pCloud". The addon stores a persistent auth token, walks every folder from root, and indexes all videos for the SALTS smart library. * Direct streaming (host + path resolved via /getfilelink) and public share links (via /getfilepublink) for debrid push. - Added: MediaFire (full account browsing). * Requires a free Application ID + API Key from https://www.mediafire.com/developers/ (Apps Manager -> Create App). Setup guide button included in Settings -> Cloud -> MediaFire. * Email + password + app credentials -> session token, then walks every folder under "myfiles" via /folder/get_content.php. * Direct download URLs via /file/get_links.php for streaming and normal_download URLs for debrid push. - Added: Sync.com - shared-link mode. Sync.com is zero-knowledge encrypted so there is no account-listing API; instead paste any number of public Sync.com share links into Settings -> Cloud -> Sync.com. SALTS resolves each link page to the direct file URL (when the link is unprotected) or hands the share URL off to the selected debrid service. - Added: iDrive - same shared-link mode as Sync.com (iDrive is a backup product without a streaming API). - Cloud library scan_all() now sweeps all six providers (Google Drive, MEGA, pCloud, MediaFire, Sync.com, iDrive) in one pass with a single progress dialog. - Cloud library get_stream_url / get_share_url dispatch the new providers so playback and send-to-debrid work end-to-end from the Plex-style movies / TV / recently-added views.
v2.9.52 (2026-01) - CONTEXT MENU HARDENING - Trakt watchlist toggle now uses this fork's real TraktAPI surface (get_watchlist / add_to_watchlist / remove_from_watchlist) with the correct plural media_type ('movies' / 'shows') and the proper payload shape [{ids: {tmdb: <id>}}]. It is now a TRUE toggle that checks current membership before deciding to add or remove. - New: TMDB local cache. All TMDB lookups inside the SALTS Info / Cast / Similar / Trailers window are cached for 7 days at special://profile/addon_data/<addon>/tmdb_cache/, keyed by endpoint + sorted query params. Re-opening a title is instant. - New context menu items on every movie/show: * Trakt: Mark Watched / Unwatched (true toggle via /sync/history) * Trakt: Rate (1-10) (posts to /sync/ratings) * Refresh Metadata Cache (drops local TMDB cache for the title) * Play + Continue with Similar (movies only) - plays the title via the normal sources flow, then auto-opens the SALTS Info window for the top-rated similar title when playback ends. Binge mode! - Trakt errors are now logged + surfaced as a clear notification instead of failing silently.
v2.9.31 (2026-01) - QR DIALOG FULL-SCREEN BACKDROP - Fix: black backdrop on the TorBox auth dialog and Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi) dialog now truly fills the whole screen on every skin (was leaving the underlying view visible around the edges).
v2.9.30 (2026-01) - QR DIALOG FIXES - TorBox auth dialog now renders on a solid-black PNG backdrop (no more transparency / poster bleed-through behind the QR). - Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi) is now a compact split-pane dialog with the QR on the right and text on the left, on a black backdrop. - Bundled art/black.png + art/white.png for reliable rendering across all skins.
v2.9.29 (2026-01) - PUT.IO DEBRID SERVICE - Added: Put.io as a 5th debrid backend, alongside Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid and TorBox. Magnet links submitted from the source dialog can now resolve to a direct streaming URL via your Put.io account. * New settings under Settings -> Debrid Services -> Put.io: - "Enable Put.io" - "OAuth Token" (paste from https://app.put.io/oauth -> Settings -> API -> Create application -> copy OAuth Token) - "Keep resolved torrents in Put.io cloud" (default OFF - the transfer + file are deleted from your Put.io drive once playback has started, mirroring the TorBox behaviour) - "Auto-play uncached torrents on Put.io" (default ON) + "Max wait for uncached torrents (minutes)" slider (1..30, default 10) - if the magnet isn't cached on Put.io, SALTS shows a background progress dialog with percent / speed / seeds while Put.io fetches the torrent, then plays it. * New "Put.io" entry in the SALTS Debrid Services menu - opens a status dialog (User / Email / Plan expiry / disk usage) once authorised, with Re-authorize / Revoke actions. * Note: Put.io does NOT expose an "instant cache" lookup API, so cached torrents are NOT pre-flagged in the source list the way RD/PM/AD/TorBox cached torrents are. Resolve still works for both cached (instant) and uncached (waits) torrents.
v2.9.27 (2026-01) - KNABEN AGGREGATOR + RD/AD PERFORMANCE - Added: Knaben scraper (https://api.knaben.org). Single API call surfaces results from 1337x, TPB, RuTracker, Nyaa, TGx and ~30 other public trackers, sorted by seeders. No setup or key required. Setting: Aggregators -> "Enable Knaben" (default ON). - Real-Debrid: resolve now picks the file matching the requested S/E for TV shows (instead of the largest file, which sometimes fetched a wrong/extra episode) and prefers that link first when unrestricting. Cuts wrong-episode playback to near zero on packs. - AllDebrid: resolve rewritten - flattens nested folder responses properly, picks S/E match for TV (else largest video), fixed a crash when AD returned files with size=None, removed a stray debug log line. Both RD and AD now accept the same (title, season, episode) kwargs as TorBox.
v2.9.26 (2026-01) - DEAD TORRENT FILTER + QR DIALOG REWRITE - Added: dead-torrent filter. Torrents with 0 (or fewer than "Minimum seeders") seeders are dropped from the source list before you ever click them, so the debrid resolver doesn't hang trying to fetch a magnet nobody is sharing. Cached debrid torrents are exempt (the debrid server already has the files - seeders don't matter). Direct / free hoster sources are exempt (no seed count). * New setting: Advanced -> "Filter dead torrents (no/low seeders)" (default ON). * New setting: Advanced -> "Minimum seeders" slider (range 0..50, default 1). - Fixed: TorBox device-code QR code displayed a blank/dim screen because the old implementation layered an OK dialog on top of Kodi's full-screen picture viewer, hiding the QR. Replaced with a custom split-pane dialog: SMALLER QR on the LEFT, full instructions (URL + code) on the RIGHT, both visible at the same time. Press OK or Back to close.
v2.9.25 (2026-01) - STRICT TITLE MATCH + TORBOX UNCACHED RESOLVE - Fixed: source list sometimes showed torrents belonging to a different movie or a different episode (e.g. "Saw X" appearing under "Saw", S02E03 appearing under S02E01). Scraper results whose filename does not match the requested title/year (movie) or S/E (TV) are now dropped before the dialog is shown. Direct-stream / free sources are not filtered (they're scraped per-TMDB id and already accurate). * New setting: Advanced -> "Strict title match" (default ON). * If the filter removes every result the un-filtered list is shown as a safety net so exotic titles still surface sources. - Fixed: TorBox could not play uncached torrents - the resolver bailed after ~6s because uncached items aren't ready instantly. TorBox can download uncached torrents server-side; SALTS now optionally waits for that with a real progress dialog (download %, speed, seeds). * New setting: TorBox -> "Resolve uncached torrents on TorBox (waits for download)" (default OFF - keeps the old fast-fail behaviour for users on Free plans). * New setting: TorBox -> "Max wait for uncached torrents (minutes)" (1..30, default 5). User can press Cancel at any time; on cancel the torrent is removed from the TorBox cloud.
v2.9.24 (2026-05) - TORBOX DEVICE CODE + QR - Authorize TorBox now lets you pick how to sign in: "Device Code" (recommended - uses TorBox's official /user/auth/device endpoints, shows a code and optional QR you can scan with your phone) or "API Key" (paste from torbox.app/settings, unchanged). - The device-code flow shows a cancellable progress dialog while it polls TorBox, supports the server's interval/expiry, and validates the returned token before saving. - Existing TorBox status menu (Plan / Email / Expiry) is preserved - pick "Re-authorize" to switch methods.
v2.9.21 (2026-02) - SCRAPERS EXTRACTED INTO SEPARATE MODULE - All 120+ scrapers have been moved out of plugin.video.salts and into their own standalone Kodi script module: script.module.salts_scrapers ("Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources", author Zeus768). - plugin.video.salts no longer ships the scrapers/ folder; it now imports every source from the new module. Behaviour is identical for end users - Kodi auto-installs script.module.salts_scrapers as a dependency. - Benefit: scrapers can now be updated, forked and re-used independently from the SALTS front-end addon. - No settings changes - all per-scraper toggles continue to live in SALTS Settings exactly as before.
v2.9.13 (2026) - ZEUS RESOLVERS + PLANETSCRAPERS + TORRENTS REVIVED - Added: zeus_resolvers - built-in non-debrid hoster regex resolvers (Streamtape, DoodStream/d000d, DDownload/ddl.to, MixDrop, OK.ru, YouTube via Piped, KrakenFiles, plus a generic /embed/ scraper). Wired into the playback path BEFORE and AFTER ResolveURL so free hosts play even when ResolveURL's HEAD-verify pass drops them. - Added: PlanetScrapers aggregator - bundles Torrentio (IMDB) plus PirateBay, RARBG, TorrentGalaxy and 1337x text-search under one SALTS scraper entry (salts_lib/planet_scrapers.py). - Revived: 1337x, YTS, TorrentGalaxy, Movie4K, PrimeWire scrapers (previously purged in 2.9.10). Re-registered in ALL_SCRAPERS with per-scraper _enabled settings. - Fixed: HLS / m3u8 streams now forward Referer / User-Agent pipe headers to inputstream.adaptive via stream_headers and manifest_headers so manifest sub-requests no longer 403. - Fixed: Bones custom resolver still runs first for Streamtape / LuluVid / DDownload hosts; zeus_resolvers is the next fallback before ResolveURL, with a last-ditch generic embed-page scrape.
v2.9.11 (2026) - RENAME CHAINS -> BONES 2 - Renamed: "TheChains Bones Shows" -> "Bones 2 Shows" - Renamed: "TheChains Wrestling" -> "Bones 2 Wrestling" Setting IDs kept (thechains_bones_shows_enabled / thechains_wrestl_enabled) so existing toggles carry over.
v2.9.10 (2026) - DEAD SCRAPER PURGE + ZEUS REMOVED - Removed: Zeus Resolvers integration (zeus_hook + optional require) until upstream resolver issues are fixed. - Changed: Bones / TheChains / Streamtape / LuluVid / DDownload links now resolve through ResolveURL ONLY. No debrid required for these hosts; the Bones custom resolver still runs first as a shortcut. - Removed: 20 dead/blocked scrapers identified from logs (Movie4K, PrimeWire, YTS, TorrentGalaxy, 1337x, PeerFlix, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix, GLODLS, iDope, BTDigg, TorrentProject, AcgTorrent, AniDex, Annatar, EtHD, YggTorrent, DyTT, MagnetDL). Settings entries cleaned up to match.
v2.9.8 (2026) - STABILITY + FREE WRESTLING & BONES SHOWS - Fixed: Scrapers no longer hang past the 30s global timeout. The ThreadPoolExecutor now cancels pending futures on timeout so slow providers don't keep logging errors after the run ends. - Fixed: TorLock URL-join bug that produced malformed URLs like "https://www.torlock2.comhttp://..." and caused DNS/hang errors. Absolute hrefs are now respected and off-domain links are skipped. - Fixed: SubsPlease "'list' object has no attribute 'items'" crash when the API returns an empty list for no-hit searches. - Tightened: Default per-request HTTP timeout lowered 30s -> 15s so a single dead host can't eat the whole scrape budget. - Added: TheChains Bones Shows scraper - free direct Streamtape streams for the non-shows/classic TV catalog (V, Buck Rogers, Bangkok Hilton, Henry IX, etc). Handles nested MAIN DIR -> SEASON X navigation. - Added: TheChains Wrestling scraper - free direct streams for WWE, AEW, NXT, Main Event, Dynamite, WrestleMania, Hall of Fame, etc. - Added: Settings toggles under Free Streams: * thechains_bones_shows_enabled (default on) * thechains_wrestl_enabled (default on)
v2.9.5 (2026) - butterbeansrstop ENHANCEMENTS - Added: Settings toggle "butterbeansrstop (srstop.link)" under Settings -> Streaming Sites (default on). - Added: Optional srstop.link username / password fields - when set, the scraper maintains a logged-in cookie jar (persisted to the addon profile) so login-gated embed URLs are revealed. - Added: Cloudflare-bypass toggle (default on) - when urllib receives a 403/503 CF challenge, the scraper transparently retries through cloudscraper if the module is available. - Added: Direct-URL capture - when the logged-in site exposes an href / data-link on the embed-selector, the scraper returns that URL so ResolveURL can resolve it directly instead of opening the page.
v2.9.4 (2026) - NEW SCRAPER: butterbeansrstop (srstop.link) - Added: butterbeansrstop scraper targeting srstop.link (TV shows only). - Parses the site's embed-selector list on episode pages to extract hoster name (luluvdo, doodstream, etc.) and quality (1080p / 720p / SD) from the vris* class markers. - Uses direct slug guessing first, then the site's /index.php?menu=search query as a fallback so it works without a site login for discovery. - Registered under the "streaming_sites" category, TV-only.
v2.9.1 (2026) - PUNCHPLAY.TV INTEGRATION - Added: PunchPlay.tv as a parallel tracker alongside Trakt. Scrobble start/pause/stop + mark-watched now mirror to your PunchPlay account whenever Trakt scrobbling fires (both can be enabled independently). - Added: Device-code login flow - open Settings -> PunchPlay, press "Login to PunchPlay", visit the URL shown, enter the code. - Added: New top-level "PunchPlay" menu with status/toggle/login/logout. - Added: New Settings -> PunchPlay category: * Enable PunchPlay scrobbling * Mark watched on PunchPlay (end of playback) * Mirror Trakt "mark watched" actions to PunchPlay * Backend URL (advanced - defaults to https://punchplay.tv) - Note: PunchPlay's non-scrobble API (watchlist, lists, calendar, etc.) is not publicly documented, so SALTS continues to use Trakt for browsing those lists. PunchPlay receives a full watch history from your scrobbles.
v2.9.0 (2026-02) - MORE STREAMTAPE / LULUVDO SOURCES - Added 10 NEW site-scrape scrapers that visit independent movie/TV sites and extract any Streamtape / LuluVdo iframe found on the watch page: * Goku.sx, GokuTV.net (multi-server streaming) * Putlockers.fm (streamtape mirrors) * MyFlixerz.to (streamtape / luluvdo servers) * FMovies24.to (streamtape / luluvdo embeds) * Soaper.live (TV shows, alt servers) * HDToday.cc (multi-server, streamtape mirror) * Flixtor.video (streamtape & luluvdo alt-servers) * MoviesJoy.plus (per-title streamtape mirrors) * French-Stream.lol (FR; off by default) - Added DuckDuckGo HTML fallback search (opt-in, off by default) - last-resort hunt for Streamtape/LuluVdo embeds when curated sites don't cover the title. - Every URL produced flows through the existing bones_resolver, so each Streamtape / LuluVdo embed is auto-converted to a direct mp4 / m3u8 link that plays in Kodi without ResolveURL. - New per-source toggles in Settings -> Free Streams. - No additional thechains24 endpoints used; Bones still uses only its original single feed URL.
v2.8.9 (2026-01-20) - BONES & SCRAPER DISPATCH FIX - Fixed: Bones scraper was skipped when no debrid service was configured (main cause of "no sources / everything erroring" reports). Bones now runs in free mode alongside VidSrc/2Embed/etc. - Fixed: Bones title matching was too loose (e.g. common words matched every movie). Now requires exact or full word-set match plus year tolerance. - Fixed: Bones year is now extracted from the stream filename so "Saw" (2004) does not collide with "Saw X" (2023), etc. - Fixed: Streamtape resolver now handles all current obfuscation patterns and all streamtape mirror domains (streamtape.to/.net/.cc/streamta.pe, etc.). - Fixed: `get_sources` dispatcher now recognizes any scraper exposing `is_free = True` and is resilient to scrapers using the legacy `search(query, media_type)` signature. - Improved: scraper-side exceptions are now logged at WARNING instead of DEBUG so they show up in kodi.log for easier diagnosis. - Added: `bones_enabled` setting so Bones can be toggled from Settings.
v2.8.0 (2026-01-15) - MASSIVE SCRAPER EXPANSION - Added: 75+ NEW SCRAPERS bringing total to 120+ sources! - Added: VidSrc Network (8 mirrors): xyz, cc, in, pm, nl, pro, me, to - Added: 2Embed variants, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay - Added: MoviesAPI, SmashyStream, NontonGo, RgShorts/RiveStream - Added: Stremio Free Addons: Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - Added: KnightCrawler, Jackettio, Orionoid, TPBPlus, AIOStreams, StremThru, MediaFlow - Added: Torrentio Free Mode, PlutoTV, Tubi integration - Added: 20+ Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, etc. - Added: Additional Torrents: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, YggTorrent, Torrent9 - Added: 12+ Anime Sources: Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe, etc. - Added: Asian Drama: WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad - Improved: Settings organized by category for easier management - Improved: Source discovery with parallel scraping support
v2.7.2 (2026-01-12) - Added: Movie Schedules - View what's playing on all movie channels for the next 12 hours - Added: Force Refresh EPG button in Movie Channels menu - Added: Returning Shows - Browse TV shows with new seasons starting in next 30 days - Added: Network Browser - Browse TV shows by network (Netflix, HBO, BBC, Amazon, Disney+, Apple TV+, and 20+ more) - Added: Episode Countdown - Track your favorite shows and see days until next episode - Added: Context menu "Track Episode Countdown" on all TV shows - Added: TODAY/TOMORROW/X days countdown indicators - Improved: EPG now shows unique movies per channel based on genre
v2.7.1 (2026-01-12) - Fixed: EPG now shows unique movies for each channel (no more duplicate listings) - Fixed: Each movie channel pulls from TMDB based on genre (Action, Comedy, Thriller, etc.) - Added: Channel logos/icons for all 35+ movie channels - Added: New Preferences settings category - Added: "Show International Premieres" setting - toggle Japanese, Chinese, Korean shows - Changed: Latest Show Premieres now defaults to English/American shows only - Added: Country indicators on international show premieres when enabled
v2.7.0 (2026-01-10) - Added: Live Movie Channels with EPG support (35+ channels worldwide) - Added: EPG integration showing current and next programs - Added: Watch Live or Start from Beginning choice for channels - Added: New Episodes Today calendar (scroll back up to 7 days) - Added: Latest Show Premieres with infinite pagination (50 items/page, last 7 days) - Added: Smart movie stream finding when clicking on live channels

addon.name: Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources

extension.summary: Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources (120+ sources for SALTS)
extension.description:
Salts Scrapers is the standalone scraper engine that powers the SALTS Kodi addon.
It bundles every scraper extracted from plugin.video.salts into its own Kodi script module, so SALTS (and any compatible front-end) can call on the sources without carrying the scraper code itself.
=== INCLUDED SOURCES (120+) ===
DIRECT STREAM SITES (No-Streamtape): - Archive.org, Cineby, VidFast, RiveStream - UiraLive, NetMirror, VidBinge, HollyMovieHD
FREE STREAMS (No Debrid Required): - VidSrc Network: xyz, cc, in, pm, nl, pro, me, to - 2Embed, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay - MoviesAPI, SmashyStream, NontonGo, RgShorts - FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie - FMovies, GoMovies, 123Movies, MoviesJoy, Putlocker - And 40+ more streaming sites
STREMIO FREE ADDONS: - Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive - PublicDomainMovies, KnightCrawler, Jackettio - AIOStreams, Torrentio (Free Mode), PlutoTV, Tubi
STREAMTAPE / LULUVDO + DOODSTREAM DIRECT-HOSTER SITES: - Goku.sx, GokuTV.net, Putlockers.fm, MyFlixerz.to - FMovies24.to, Soaper.live, HDToday.cc, Flixtor.video - MoviesJoy.plus, VegaMovies, MoviesMod, HDHub4U - SkyMoviesHD, FilmyZilla, MovieRulz, MKVCinemas - Bolly4U, MoviesDa, KatMovieHD
BONES / TheChains: - Bones, Bones 2 Shows, Bones 2 Wrestling
TORRENT SITES: - Primary: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TPB, TorrentGalaxy, SolidTorrents - Secondary: LimeTorrents, Torrentz2, RARBG, Kickass - Additional: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV - Russian: RuTracker, RuTor, NNM-Club - Chinese: BTBTT | French: Torrent9
ANIME: - Nyaa, Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime - AnimePahe, AnimeFlix, KickAssAnime, YugenAnime - AllAnime, AnimeSuge, Aniwatch, SubsPlease - AnimeTosho, TokyoTosho
ASIAN DRAMA: - WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad
AGGREGATORS: - Jackett, Prowlarr, TorrentAPI, PlanetScrapers
STREMIO DEBRID-ENHANCED: - Torrentio, MediaFusion, Comet, EasyNews+
This addon does nothing on its own - it is a Python module addon (script.module) that is imported by SALTS. Install it from the same source as SALTS or it will be auto-installed as a dependency.
Refactored out of plugin.video.salts by Zeus768. Original SALTS author: tknorris.
extension.news:
v1.0.2 (2026-02) - Added: Meteor scraper (https://meteorfortheweebs.midnightignite.me). High-performance Stremio addon with P2P + debrid support. Covers movie / series / anime / hentai (idPrefixes tt + kitsu). Default ON; toggle via Settings -> Stremio -> meteor_enabled. Override URL via Settings -> meteor_url.
v1.0.1 (2026-02) - Comet scraper: switched primary endpoint to https://comet.feels.legal (public no-config Comet instance, ~1.4k streams per query). Old elfhosted gateways kept as automatic fallback. Override is still possible via Settings -> Stremio -> comet_url.
v1.0.0 (2026-02) - Initial release. Extracted from plugin.video.salts v2.9.20. - Contains 120+ scrapers across direct streams, free streams, Stremio addons, torrent sites, anime, asian drama, international sources and aggregators. - Author: Zeus768

extension.description:
Tinklepad v1.9.4 - Torbox Debrid Support
CUSTOM XML WINDOWS: - Beautiful golden-themed search progress window - WindowXML dialogs with threading/callbacks - Animated golden spinner/orb effect - Provider-by-provider progress bars - LINK HUB v3, ARCHIVE STREAM, PEER NETWORK, NEXUS DATABASE - Real-time source count updates
SOURCE SELECTION: - Stunning golden-themed source list - Color-coded sources (FREE=green, DDL=gold, TORRENT=orange) - Quality badges: 4K=red, 1080p=green, 720p=blue - Poster and metadata display - Smooth scrolling list
FALLBACK DIALOGS: - Automatic fallback to standard Kodi dialogs - Works on all Kodi versions/skins
DEBRID SUPPORT: - Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize, Torbox - Magnet/Torrent cloud downloading
By Zeus768
extension.news:
v1.9.9 - Critical Background PNG Fix: - FIX: The shipped common/black.png and common/white.png were corrupted 70-byte stubs that Kodi was silently rejecting, which is why every dialog still showed fanart bleed-through even after v1.9.7's layout rewrite - FIX: Regenerated both PNGs as proper opaque 8x8 RGBA textures — the Source Link Search and Select Source dialogs now have a fully solid black background as intended - No other changes from v1.9.8 (SALTS Scrapers integration retained)
v1.9.8 - SALTS Scrapers Integration: - NEW: Tinklepad now supports SALTS Scrapers (script.module.salts_scrapers, 120+ sources: free streams, Stremio addons, torrent sites, anime, asian drama, international, aggregators) - NEW: Auto-detects script.module.salts_scrapers when installed alongside Tinklepad - NEW: Toggle "Enable SALTS Scrapers (120+ sources)" under Settings -> External Scrapers (OFF by default to avoid slowing first-run searches) - Each SALTS scraper still honours its own is_enabled() flag, so individual scrapers can be tuned inside the SALTS module if it exposes settings - Results are tagged [SALTS] in the source list and routed through the existing debrid resolver for torrent / DDL links and played directly for free streams - Install: download script.module.salts_scrapers from https://github.com/Zeus768/zeus768 and "Install from zip"
v1.9.7 - Link Picker/Finder Readability Fix: - FIX: Source Link Search dialog now has a fully opaque black background so all text is readable (no more fanart bleed-through) - FIX: Select Link dialog now has a fully opaque black background - FIX: Status labels (Pending / Searching / Found: N links) no longer overlap with progress bars - FIX: Title, meta line, genres under poster no longer overlap - FIX: Overall progress percent moved out from under the bar - NEW: Poster is now shown on the LEFT with plot/synopsis on the RIGHT (both on solid black panel) - NEW: Plot text is shown in BOTH the search progress window AND the source selection window - NEW: Outer gold frame and unified Golden-Eagle theme across both dialogs - NEW: Cleaner provider rows with bar + status label spaced apart - Legacy select_link.xml fallback also rewritten with same readable layout
v1.9.6 - Torbox Usenet: - NEW: Torbox Usenet (NZB) resolution - .nzb links and indexer URLs are now sent through /usenet/createusenetdownload and resolved via /usenet/requestdl - NEW: Unified resolver auto-detects NZB links (extension .nzb, /getnzb/ paths, nzb= query) and routes to the Usenet flow with a graceful webdl fallback - Longer Usenet polling window (~5 min) suitable for non-cached posts
v1.9.5 - Torbox Fixes: - FIX: Torbox authorization no longer silently fails on Kodi 21 (use positional input dialog args; trim whitespace from pasted API keys) - FIX: Clearer error messages on 401/403/network errors during Torbox auth - FIX: Torbox magnet add now uses multipart/form-data (more reliable across edge proxies) - FIX: Torbox torrent polling extended (45 iterations) and properly inspects download_present/download_finished/cached - NEW: Torbox Web Download support - DDL hosts (Nitroflare, Rapidgator, etc.) now resolved through Torbox via /webdl - NEW: Unified resolver tries Torbox for any URL, not just magnets - NOTE: Bring your own Torbox API key - get it from https://torbox.app/settings
v1.9.4 - Torbox Debrid Support: - NEW: Integrated Torbox as a debrid provider - NEW: Torbox API key authorization flow (simple one-step setup from torbox.app) - NEW: Torbox category in addon settings alongside RD/AD/PM - NEW: Tools menu shows Torbox status (authorized user / not authorized) - NEW: Unified resolver tries Torbox for magnet/torrent sources - NEW: Torbox status appears in source list debrid status bar (TB:user)
v1.9.3 - Movie Networks & Per-Network Icons: - NEW: Networks menu added to Movies (uses TMDB watch-providers, defaults to US region) - NEW: TV Networks now show per-network placeholder icons (Netflix, Prime, Disney+, HBO, etc.) - NEW: 'watch_region' setting honored for movie streaming filters

extension.summary: Superpowered Trakt Player - Click and Play with Debrid, AI Vibes, Discovery Feed
extension.description:
Trakt Player v2.3.0 - Click-and-Play via 5 Debrid services (Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize, TorBox, LinkSnappy). Real account info with expiry tracking. AI Vibes, Discovery Feed, Trakt Scrobbling, Recommendations, Calendar, Friends, Stats, Custom Lists. Created by zeus768.
Features: - Click-and-Play: Auto 1080p via debrid with cache-first priority - AI Vibes: Mood-based movie marathons powered by AI - Discovery Feed: Trending/upcoming trailers with marathon mode - Trakt Superpowers: Recommendations, Calendar, Continue Watching, Friends, Stats - Debrid: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize with file-based token storage - Scrobble: Automatic Trakt scrobbling during playback - Up Next: Auto-play next episode - Custom Lists: Create, browse, and manage Trakt lists
Created by zeus768.
CHANGELOG:
v2.2.0 - Feature Merge + Premiumize Fix - MERGED: All custom features into zeus768's v2.1.6 fixed build - FIXED: Premiumize device code auth (was hitting /api/token instead of /token) - ADDED: AI Vibes - mood-based discovery with 12 presets + custom - ADDED: Discovery Feed - trending trailers, new releases, upcoming, shuffle, marathon - ADDED: Continue Watching from Trakt playback progress - ADDED: Recommended For You (personalized Trakt recommendations) - ADDED: Anticipated movies/shows - ADDED: My Calendar (upcoming episodes) - ADDED: My Custom Lists (create, browse, manage) - ADDED: Popular Community Lists - ADDED: Friends activity feed - ADDED: User Stats dashboard - ADDED: Account Status (debrid expiry, premium status) - ADDED: Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi QR code) - ADDED: Rate on Trakt, Add to Watchlist, Add to List
v2.1.6 - Speed Optimizations - FASTER: Trakt lists now load 3-5x faster with parallel TMDB image fetching - FASTER: Reduced items per page to 30 for quicker loading - FASTER: Added image caching to avoid re-fetching - FASTER: Reduced API timeouts for snappier response
v2.1.5 - Major Fixes - FIXED: Trakt and Debrid authorization now persists properly - FIXED: Uses file-based token storage (trakt_token.json, rd_token.json) - FIXED: Auto-play with proper quality fallback (1080p to 720p to 480p) - FIXED: Cached torrent detection and priority playback - ADDED: Unlimited scroll/pagination in all lists - ADDED: Addon icon and fanart in all subfolders
v1.0.8 - Initial Release - Trakt and Debrid authorization using native urllib
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content.
extension.news:
v2.4.12 (2026) - TORBOX: Link resolution overhaul * Cache-first check before adding a magnet (instant cached torrents) * Polling now uses 'download_present', 'cached' and progress signals so streams start the moment Torbox can serve them * Robust duplicate-add handling: existing torrent_id is recovered from /torrents/mylist by info-hash if createtorrent doesn't return it * Background progress dialog for uncached torrents (up to 3min wait) * Web download (unrestrict) flow uses the same readiness logic - TORBOX: Dual auth - device code OR manual API key * Settings now expose an "Enter API Key Manually" action * Pasted API key is validated against /user/me before saving * tb_api_key setting is editable; takes priority over file token - NEW: Gofile.io anonymous re-upload * After resolving a Torbox magnet, optionally re-upload the stream to Gofile and get a shareable link * Right-click any Torbox cloud torrent file -> "Upload to Gofile" * Last Gofile link is saved in settings and copyable via action
v2.4.11 (2026) - TORBOX: Major rewrite of the Torbox integration * Smart file selection: largest video file is now picked from torrents, usenet packs and web downloads, with automatic filtering of samples and other non-content extras * Cached lookup: single-hash and batched cached checks using the official list format, with automatic chunking up to 100 hashes per call * Magnet add now uses seed=3 and disables zip packaging for direct play * Robust polling for torrent / usenet / webdl readiness, with retries - TORBOX: Cloud browser expanded * My Torrents (with delete, file listing and direct play) * My Usenet Downloads (browse, play, delete) * My Web Downloads (browse, play, delete) - TORBOX: Add-from-anywhere actions in the Torbox cloud menu * Add Web Download (paste a URL, Torbox fetches it) * Add Usenet NZB URL (paste an NZB link, optional name) * Add Magnet (paste a magnet, file ready to stream when complete) - TORBOX: Per-file streaming endpoints for torrents / usenet / web, using the Torbox token query parameter as required by the API - INTERNAL: Shared video extension and extras filter for cleaner code, size formatter unified across the cloud browser
v2.4.3 (2026) - FIXED: Wrong posters in mixed Trakt lists (watchlists, popular lists, custom lists, history, friend activity, continue watching). * Each item's actual type (movie/show/episode) is now detected from Trakt's own 'type' field instead of a hard-coded default. * Posters now fetched from the correct TMDB namespace (movie vs tv), fixing random/unrelated artwork being shown for TV shows. * Episode entries (history, playback progress) now correctly use the parent show's poster. * Image batch limit increased from 30 to 100 so long lists also get posters for every item.
v2.4.2 (2026) - NEW: 1337x Scraper - reliable torrent source with multiple mirrors - NEW: Debrid Cloud Browser - browse and play files from your debrid cloud * Real-Debrid: View torrents, files, download history * Premiumize: Browse cloud files and folders, view transfers * Torbox: View torrents and files * AllDebrid: Browse magnets and files - Delete items from cloud via context menu - Direct playback from cloud without re-searching
v2.4.1 (2026) - FIXED: Critical playback bug - added missing extract_hash() function - Links now resolve and play correctly via debrid services - Hash extraction supports both hex (40-char) and base32 (32-char) formats
v2.4.0 (2026) - NEW: Episode Notifications - Get alerts when new episodes drop for your watchlist shows - NEW: Pre-Cache Next Episode - Auto-adds next episode to debrid while watching - Background service for notifications and pre-cache monitoring - New settings categories for notifications and pre-cache options
v2.3.1 (2026) - FIXED: Premiumize authorization (ported working OAuth flow from v2.1.8) - FIXED: Torbox authorization (ported working device code auth from v2.1.8)
v2.3.0 (2026) - FIXED: Real-Debrid false "expired" errors (token refresh fallback) - ADDED: TorBox debrid (device code auth, cache check, magnet resolve) - ADDED: LinkSnappy debrid (login auth, 30+ file host link generation) - ADDED: Real account info for all 5 debrid services (RD/AD/PM/TB/LS) - Color-coded expiry warnings on Account Status page
v2.2.0 (2026) - FIXED: Premiumize device code auth (was hitting /api/token instead of /token) - MERGED: All custom features into zeus768's v2.1.6 fixed build - ADDED: AI Vibes, Discovery Feed, Continue Watching, Recommendations - ADDED: Calendar, Custom Lists, Popular Lists, Friends, Stats - ADDED: Account Status, Buy Me a Beer, Rate, Watchlist, Add to List
v2.1.6 (2026) - FASTER: Trakt lists 3-5x faster with parallel TMDB image fetching - FASTER: Image caching, reduced API timeouts
v2.1.5 (2026) - FIXED: Trakt/Debrid auth persistence (file-based token storage) - ADDED: Unlimited pagination, quality fallback playback

extension.summary: Vidscr — Movies & TV via TMDB + Vidsrc (by Zeus768)
extension.description: A clean, simple Movies & TV Shows addon. Browse new releases, Oscar nominees, genres, actors, networks and a 7-day premiering calendar. Posters and metadata from TMDB; streams sourced from vidsrcme.ru (with optional vidsrc.xyz / 2embed secondary), built-in resolvers, server sub-picker, per-show quality memory, Trakt scrobbling, watched/resume indicators and 10-second stall auto-fallback.
extension.news: v1.4.19 — Added Ophim as Vidnest backend #8 (route: new.vidnest.fun/klikxxi/movie/{tmdb}). After v1.4.18 was built, Vidnest expanded their bundle from 7 to 11 backend definitions - I rechecked their site, confirmed 8 are functional (the other 3 either need a proxy config we cannot supply or are duplicate AllMovies endpoints). Net effect: 1 additional working backend per title - small but free. The progress dialog now shows 8/8 rather than 7/7. NOTE on direct-movies.com, Cineby, Nontongo investigation: direct-movies.com is SEO bait with no actual streaming content. Cineby's backend (backend.cineby.sc) is WebSocket-only and returns 403 to all HTTP endpoints - would need full WS protocol reverse-engineering. Nontongo has an encrypted payload format similar to Vidnest BUT their decryption JS is gated by origin/IP checks that block static scrapers. Same story for 2embed.cc, multiembed, vidking, fmovies-hd, 111movies, vidsrc.in, autoembed, consumet, moviesapi.to - all either Cloudflare-blocked, geo-locked, dead, or wrap the same backends Vidnest already aggregates. The 2026 free-streaming landscape has consolidated; there is no undiscovered easy-API equivalent to Vidnest. Best path forward for more reliability: smart auto-pick that races stream segments and starts on whichever responds fastest.
v1.4.18 — TRAKT / SIMKL / BINGEBASE TRACKING FIX.

v1.4.17 — NEW SOURCE: Vidnest multi-backend (vidnest.fun). Reverse-engineered the site's encrypted JSON envelope and now queries SEVEN independent providers in PARALLEL — MoviesAPI, PurStream, AllMovies, CatFlix, HollyMovieHD, FlixHQ and VidLink — merging every working HLS / MP4 stream into the source list. NEW: live per-source progress dialog. Toggle: Settings -> Sources -> "Enable Vidnest multi-backend" (on by default).

v1.4.16 — DEPENDENCY FIX: embedded pure-Python AES-256-GCM and ChaCha20-Poly1305 (resources/lib/purecrypto.py) — verified against NIST AES-GCM and RFC 7539 test vectors. Stigstream now works on every Kodi install regardless of which crypto modules are present.

v1.4.14 — NEW SOURCE: Stigstream (stigstream.ru). Reverse-engineered the site's doubly-encrypted JSON API (outer AES-256-GCM, inner ChaCha20-Poly1305, both keyed via HKDF-SHA512 from a 32-byte master extracted from the public JS bundle), then queries 8 of its regional servers IN PARALLEL and merges every working stream into the source list.

v1.4.8 — FIX (Trakt / SIMKL / Bingebase OAuth): token is now persisted to BOTH the addon settings (primary) and the local JSON file (backup). HTTP 409 ("code already used") is now handled. New "Show token status" debug actions confirm exactly what is stored.
v1.1.0 — Trakt scrobbling, watched / resume indicators, 10s stall auto-fallback. Secondary source toggle, server sub-picker, per-show quality memory.

extension.description: Browses a remote XML library and tests link resolution exclusively through the script.module.zeusresolvers module. Targets Kodi 21 (Omega) and newer.
extension.news:
v1.0.5 - Diagnostics: any crash now dumps a full Python traceback into the TextViewer instead of silently failing in Kodi's directory loader - Requires script.module.zeusresolvers >= 1.0.3
v1.0.4 - Diagnostics: new "Capture + probe" mode. Fetches the hoster page raw and dumps every getElementById('*link').innerHTML JS expression, every hidden div, and every form input field into the TextViewer alongside the resolve() output. Lets the next obfuscation tweak be diagnosed from a single screenshot. - Requires script.module.zeusresolvers >= 1.0.2
v1.0.3 - New "Diagnostics" entry: offline matcher self-test for every supported host plus an optional live resolve() probe with a TextViewer report - Requires script.module.zeusresolvers >= 1.0.1
v1.0.2 - New ZR Tester branding (icon and fanart)
v1.0.1 - Added "Test custom URL" entry for resolving and playing arbitrary hoster links - Custom URL history saved between sessions
v1.0.0 - Initial release - Streams XML library from Pastebin - Resolves Streamtape and DDownload links via script.module.zeusresolvers

extension.summary: Debrid-free URL resolver for Streamtape and DDownloads
extension.description: Zeus Resolvers is a lightweight Kodi Python module that resolves direct playable streams from selected file hosters (Streamtape, DDownloads) without requiring a Debrid subscription. Acts as a drop-in primary resolver with automatic fallback to ResolveURL for any other host.
extension.news: v1.0.3 - Streamtape: rewritten to yt-dlp / ResolveURL conservative style. Only the authoritative `ideoooolink` / `norobotlink` elements are matched, using the exact `'PART1' + ('PART2').substring(N)` form. The page's `botlink` / `robotlink` honeypots that produce trap URLs (e.g. `streamtape.cddcom/...`, `streamtape.com/streamtape.com/get_videod?...`) are now ignored. - Streamtape + DDownloads: every resolved URL is validated against a strict pattern before return. Anything that doesn't match (double host, `cdd` injection, missing media extension, etc.) returns `None` so the caller falls through cleanly to ResolveURL. v1.0.2 - Streamtape: extended JS string evaluator to also handle .replace(), .split().join(), .slice() and .trim(). Streamtape injects a 3-char marker (e.g. 'cdd') into the host string and strips it back out via one of those calls; without this, resolved URLs hit a bogus host (streamtape.cddcom -> 404) - New regression tests covering all three obfuscation patterns from reported kodi.log v1.0.1 - Streamtape: proper JS substring evaluation for the obfuscated token (was producing the wrong token -> 403 from CDN) - Streamtape + DDownloads: append Kodi `|User-Agent=...&Referer=...` to the resolved URL so the player passes the headers the CDN expects v1.0.0 - Initial release - Streamtape resolver (norobotlink/ideoooolink token extraction) - DDownloads resolver (two-step form POST + redirect capture) - Public API: zeusresolvers.resolve(url), zeusresolvers.can_resolve(url)
